name: BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads
notes: BB to detect multiple blocked uploads from the same IP address within 30 min
bb_references: BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.FTP Action Denied, Access.Firewall Session Closed, Access.Access Denied
when the destination port is one of the following 443, 21, 80
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Multiple Blocked File Uploads on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.FTP Action Denied, Access.Firewall Session Closed, Access.Access Denied
AND when the destination port is one of the following 443, 21, 80
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP in 30 minutes
